The constant version proves the sign/bookkeeping lemmas reuse cleanly. ExtraDegeneracy route is a documented dead end (wrong variance, no cosimplicial dual in Mathlib).

attempts.strategy: Part 1 of lem:injective_cech_acyclic: an injective sheaf of O_X-modules is injective as a presheaf of modules, via the right adjoint of the (exact, mono-preserving) sheafification.
attempts.code_tried: exact Injective.injective_of_adjoint (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.val)) I — one-liner term
attempts.lean_error: (deterministic) timeout at typeclass / heartbeat blow-up synthesizing `Injective I` — the expected category instance (SheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf) is not syntactically the one carried by X.Modules
attempts.insight: toPresheafOfModules X = SheafOfModules.forget ⋙ restrictScalars (𝟙 _) by rfl, but X.Modules vs SheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf are not syntactically the same category instance.

attempts.strategy: Insert a syntactically-matching Injective instance before applying the adjoint lemma.
attempts.code_tried: haveI : Injective (C := SheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf) I := ‹Injective I›; haveI : (sheafification (𝟙 _)).PreservesMonomorphisms := inferInstance; exact Injective.injective_of_adjoint (sheafificationAdjunction (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.val)) I

attempts.strategy: Per-term core of lem:cech_complex_hom_identification: Hom(free(yoneda V), F) ≃ F(V), as freeHomEquiv ∘ yonedaEquiv.
attempts.goal_before: ((free X.ringCatSheaf.obj).obj (yoneda.obj V) ⟶ F) ≃ (F.presheaf ⋙ forget Ab).obj (op V)
attempts.insight: Bare Equiv of hom-sets (type-level bijection) only — NOT additive/R-linear, no naturality in F. To assemble the cochain-complex iso it must be upgraded to an AddEquiv natural in F and compatible with the alternating differential. Treat as verified per-term core, not the finished hom-identification.

next_steps: Upgrade to additive + natural; then per-degree coproduct-hom equiv Hom(⨁_σ Aσ,F)≅∏_σ Hom(Aσ,F) (Mathlib has NO packaged biproduct.homEquiv/Sigma.homEquiv — assemble from Sigma.ι/Sigma.desc + Sigma.ι_desc); then HomologicalComplex.Hom.isoOfComponents.

attempts.insight: Dead end to avoid: do NOT derive the cosimplicial object from the Čech nerve of the cover in Opens X — Opens X is a poset so the nerve's fibre products degenerate (A×_B A = A⊓A = A) and the index ι is lost. The indexed product over Fin(p+1)→ι must be explicit.

next_steps: Build the CosimplicialObject with full functoriality, then alternatingCofaceMapComplex. Recommended first target for the next PresheafCech lane.
